metadata.description: Cursor assistant plugins for the umbraculum-toolset family of projects. Four plugins: a small common plugin that carries the language-agnostic meta-framework rules + the generate-development-local skill; a generic Node/React/TS assistant suitable for any TS/JS project; an umbraculum-platform-specific TS/JS assistant that encodes the four-slice foundation-hardening discipline (lint + types + tests + docs); and an OpenPLC + Python + FastAPI + Modbus + hardware-doc assistant for the industrial-automation sister-repo (openplc/brewery). The three domain plugins are designed to be installed alongside the common plugin (Cursor's plugin.json has no manifest-level dependency field; the pairing is README-level).

plugins.name: umbraculum-toolset-common
plugins.description: Common meta-framework rules + skills shared by the umbraculum-toolset Cursor plugins. Install alongside any of the three domain plugins (umbraculum-node-react-cursor-assistant / umbraculum-platform-tsjs-cursor-assistant / umbraculum-openplc-python-cursor-assistant).

plugins.name: umbraculum-node-react-cursor-assistant
plugins.description: Generic Node/TypeScript/React/E2E Cursor assistant with rules, skills, and agents. Suitable for any TS/JS project (the umbraculum- brand prefix is for marketplace name-uniqueness, not because the plugin is umbraculum-specific). Install alongside umbraculum-toolset-common.

plugins.name: umbraculum-platform-tsjs-cursor-assistant
plugins.description: Umbraculum-platform-specific Cursor assistant for the TS/JS half of the platform: encodes the four-slice foundation-hardening discipline (lint + types + tests + docs) and the multi-tenant workspace-scoped architectural patterns used in umbraculum-dev. Install alongside umbraculum-toolset-common (and typically umbraculum-node-react-cursor-assistant).

plugins.name: umbraculum-openplc-python-cursor-assistant
plugins.description: OpenPLC + Python + FastAPI + Modbus + hardware-doc Cursor assistant for the industrial-automation sister-repo (openplc/brewery). Encodes the IEC-61131-3 source-vs-build discipline, the PI_* Modbus mailbox contract, the FastAPI/Jinja/SQLite Pi-sidecar conventions, and the hardware-doc + ASCII-diagram-pamphlet authoring rules. Install alongside umbraculum-toolset-common.
